From Ancient Canals to Modern Charm: HK Express Launches Daily Flights to Wuxi
description: If you’re looking to explore a side of China that balances serene water towns with a booming modern food scene, your travel options just expanded. HK Express has announced a new daily direct service between Hong Kong and Wuxi Shuofang Airport (WUX), officially taking flight on July 17, 2026. Often called the “Pearl of Taihu [...] The post From Ancient Canals to Modern Charm: HK Express Launches Daily Flights to Wuxi first appeared on THE LOOP HK .

title: Seven-year-old 'shocked' after finding ancient bone at Suffolk beach
description: Ipswich schoolgirl Nina Evans has left her family stunned after finding the bone of a woolly mammoth on a day out to Felixstowe beach.

title: Turkey to race ahead of EU on battery storage amid fossil fuel crisis
description: More than 33GW of battery capacity approved for Turkish grid since 2022 compared with 12-13GW in Germany

title: Turkey to race ahead of EU on battery storage amid fossil fuel crisis
description: More than 33GW of battery capacity approved for Turkish grid since 2022 compared with 12-13GW in Germany Turkey has given the green light to more batteries to buffer its electricity grid than any EU member state, a report has found, in a further sign of rich countries losing steam in the race to a clean economy. More than 33GW of battery capacity have been approved in Turkey since 2022, according to the climate thinktank Ember, while the total planned and operational capacity in European frontrunners that started deploying them earlier, such as Germany and Italy, is 12-13GW. Continue reading...
